Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class MLFilter

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.MLFilter
public class MLFilter extends Object

Java class for MLFilter complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="MLFilter">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="filterName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="lhFilter" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MLFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lhPredictionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lhType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AIValueType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lhUnit" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AIFilterUnit" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="lhValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="operation" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AIFilterOperation"/>
         <element name="rhFilter" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}MLFilter" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rhPredictionField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rhType" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AIValueType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rhUnit" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}AIFilterUnit" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="rhValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="sortOrder" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
